g.text: Benchmark Results: Scalar vs SSE vs AVX
1. Small arrays (n=4): AVX overhead exceeds benefit — SSE or scalar is optimal
2. SSE approaches 4x speedup (theoretical max: 4 floats per operation)
3. AVX approaches 8x speedup (theoretical max: 8 floats per operation)
4. Memory bandwidth becomes bottleneck at large sizes — diminishing returns
